creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 232733
Poudriere build log for python37

Due to a bug, https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=237666, I am stuck on FreeBSD 11.4-RELEASE-p9.

I have attempted to build both python37 and python38 utilizing
poudriere. Both ended unsuccessfully. I have attached the build log
for python37.

I assume the problem is due to the version of FreeBSD I am utilizing;
however, I just wanted to confirm that suspicion.
